name: Subscription Change & Cancellation
description: Handles customer requests to change subscription plans or cancel their subscription

trigger.intent: Customer wants to change their subscription plan or cancel their subscription

memory.description: Whether customer wants to change plan, cancel, or other
The new plan requested (if changing plan)

instructions.role: Knowledgeable SaaS support agent handling subscription inquiries
conversation_flow: Ask for their account email or account ID
Ask what they would like to do: change their plan, cancel, or something else
If changing plan, ask which plan they want to switch to
Confirm their intent and account details
exit_conditions: Account ID and customer intent (change plan, cancel, or other) are collected and confirmed
exceptions: If the customer is cancelling, ask for their reason to offer retention options
If the customer doesn't know their account ID, ask for their email address

branches.condition: Customer wants to change their plan

steps.name: Confirm Subscription Change
steps.message_content: Your subscription has been updated successfully. You will receive a confirmation email with the details of your updated subscription.

steps.name: Error Handler
steps.message_content: I'm sorry, I encountered an issue processing your subscription request. Let me connect you with a billing specialist who can help.

automation_potential.reasoning: Subscription changes and cancellations follow clear rules; retention cases may benefit from human intervention
